memoryArtifacts.headline: Bodiam Castle
memoryArtifacts.description: Bodiam Castle (/ˈboʊdiəm/) is a 14th-century moated castle near Robertsbridge in East Sussex, England. It was built in 1385 by Sir Edward Dalyngrigge, a former knight of Edward III, with the permissio …

memoryArtifacts.headline: Sir Edward Dallingridge
memoryArtifacts.description: Sir Edward Dallingridge received a 'licence to crenellate' from the king, allowing him to build a castle at his manor of Bodiam.  A copy of the licence can be found in the Public Record Office in Kew. …

zh.Robertsbridge, Sussex, England: 英國素可洛波次布利其
zh.Beddington, Surrey, England: 英國英格蘭素瑞貝丁頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Edward Dalyngruge於大約1346年出生在英國英格蘭素瑞貝丁頓時，他的父親Roger Dallingridge37歲，母親Alice Radingden32歲。他於大約1364年11月與Elizabeth Wardedieu結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1393年在英國素可波迪亞姆享年48歲，埋葬在英國素可洛波次布利其。

zh-hans.Robertsbridge, Sussex, England: 英国素可洛波次布利其
zh-hans.Beddington, Surrey, England: 英国英格兰素瑞貝丁頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Edward Dalyngruge于大约1346年出生在英国英格兰素瑞貝丁頓时，他的父亲Roger Dallingridge37岁，母亲Alice Radingden32岁。他于大约1364年11月与Elizabeth Wardedieu结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1393年在英国素可波迪亞姆享年48岁，埋葬在英国素可洛波次布利其。

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Edward Dalyngruge was born about 1346, in Beddington, Surrey, England, United Kingdom, his father, Roger Dallingridge, was 37 and his mother, Alice Radingden, was 32. He married Elizabeth Wardedieu about November 1364. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in 1393, in Bodiam, Sussex, England, at the age of 48, and was buried in Robertsbridge, Sussex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Edward Dalyngruge est né environ 1346, à Beddington, Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Roger Dallingridge, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Alice Radingden, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Wardedieu environ novembre 1364. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1393, à Bodiam, Sussex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterré à Robertsbridge, Sussex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Edward Dalyngruge um 1346 in Beddington, Surrey, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger Dallingridge 37 und seine Mutter Alice Radingden 32. Er hat um November 1364 Elizabeth Wardedieu geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1393 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Bodiam, Sussex, England und wurde in Robertsbridge, Sussex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edward Dalyngruge è nato il circa 1346 nel Beddington, Surrey, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Roger Dallingridge, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Alice Radingden, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Wardedieu circa novembre 1364. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1393, nel Bodiam, Sussex, England, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolto a Robertsbridge, Sussex, England.

ja.Robertsbridge, Sussex, England: イギリススセックスロバートスブリッジ
ja.Bodiam, Sussex, England: イギリススセックスボディアム
ja.Beddington, Surrey, England: イギリスイギリススリーベッドイントン
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Edward Dalyngrugeが約1346年にイギリスイギリススリーベッドイントンで生まれた時，父Roger Dallingridgeは37歳，母Alice Radingdenは32歳であった。約1364年11月にElizabeth Wardedieuと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1393年にイギリススセックスボディアムで48歳で死去し，イギリススセックスロバートスブリッジにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Edward Dalyngruge(이)가 대략 1346년 영국 잉글랜드 수리 베딩턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger Dallingridge(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Radingden(은)는 32세였다. 그는 대략 1364년 11월 Elizabeth Wardedieu(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1393년 영국 수세스 보디암에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수세스 로버츠브리지에 묻혔다.

mn.Beddington, Surrey, England: Beddington, Sūþrīge, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edward Dalyngruge nasceu aproximadamente 1346, em Beddington, Surrey, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Roger Dallingridge, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Alice Radingden, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Wardedieu aproximadamente novembro de 1364. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1393, em Bodiam, Sussex, Inglaterra, com 48 anos, e foi sepultado em Robertsbridge, Sussex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Edward Dalyngruge родился около 1346 г. в местности беддингтон, сурри, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Roger Dallingridge было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Radingden, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Wardedieu около ноябрь 1364 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1393 г. в местности бодям, суссекс, Англия в возрасте 48 лет и был похоронен в местности робирцбридж, суссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Edward Dalyngruge nació aproximadamente 1346, en Beddington, Surrey, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Roger Dallingridge, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Alice Radingden, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Wardedieu aproximadamente noviembre de 1364. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1393, en Bodiam, Sussex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultado en Robertsbridge, Sussex, Inglaterra.
